Permafrost
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2007 at 8:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593374752573
Scholar
30 posts
Permafrost is a great place for drops for Tier 4 new cultural, which makes the Simple DoN armor. I got plate/chain, leather, and silk drops from there, both the primary (ore, animal pelts, silk) and secondary components (loam, marrow, spinneret fluid).
▲ Page top
Drops
